global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale for CoinBridge with a focus on transparency in fees.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a lighter orange shade.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Track every euro' positioned centrally within the main subject.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main text that reads 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Bold, yellow text at the top stating 'CoinBridge SALE' with a slight shadow effect.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in bold.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small white label in the top corner that says 'UGC' in a bold font.

elements.label: Visual accents
elements.description: Minimalistic design elements that enhance the overall aesthetic without distracting from the main message.

embedding_texts.global_text: CoinBridge, unknown vertical, interstitial format, bright and modern visual style, key elements include sale announcement and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CoinBridge SALE, Track every euro, No hidden fees, Watch now, UGC
